description: A styled h2 heading used on news index pages, always displaying 'News stories'.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Standard news index heading with default text

stories.name: CustomText
stories.description: Heading with custom text for alternate use

notes: Text is always 'News stories' across all sampled pages (133 pages, textVaries:false). A text prop is included with a default value for flexibility, but can be hardcoded if strict fidelity is preferred.
